title: Allow forms to add items to other groups than just the top group
excerpt: It would be really helpful to allow a form to add a new line item to different groups rather than just the top group on a board.  Maybe some sort of setting to allow the board owner to select the group to direct a new fo…

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really helpful to allow a form to add a new line item to different groups rather than just the top group on a board. Maybe some sort of setting to allow the board owner to select the group to direct a new form response to.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bmauch,

This is actually supported in the form builder settings

Screen Shot 2023-05-24 at 10.59.03 am1470×693 60.8 KB

Let me know if this is what you’re looking for

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh wow - I’ve always overlooked that. This is exactly what I was looking for. Thank you!

posts.author: khoyt (Kate Hoyt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT - Is there a way to allow the form respondent to select a specific group to assign the item to or create a new group?
